div.p: OSUS Real Estate Brokerage LLC | Secure & Compliant Onboarding

div.label: Upload Passport Copy * (at least one ID document required)

div.div: Click to upload or drag & drop

t.t-out: error.get('id_document','Please upload a Passport or Emirates ID copy.')

textarea.name: residential_address
textarea.placeholder: Building name, floor, apartment / villa number, street name

div.p: Select all that apply to your transaction funds

t.div: Please select at least one source of funds.

div.p: How was your overall wealth accumulated?

div.label: Annual Estimated Income *
div.p: Enter your gross annual income in UAE Dirhams

div.label: Currency
div.p: Select currency if income is not in AED

A Politically Exposed Person is an individual who holds, or has held, a prominent public function. This includes heads of state, senior politicians, senior government/judicial/military officials, senior executives of state-owned companies, and senior political party officials.

div.label: Are you, or have you been, a Politically Exposed Person? *

select.name: politically_exposed_person
select.option: Yes — I am / am related to a PEP

textarea.name: pep_details
textarea.placeholder: Describe the position held, country, and period

div.label: I have read and agree to the Terms & Conditions of OSUS Real Estate Brokerage LLC. I confirm all information provided is true, accurate, and complete.

t.div: You must accept this to proceed.

div.label: I consent to my personal data being processed in accordance with the Privacy Policy and the UAE Personal Data Protection Law (Federal Decree-Law No. 45 of 2021).

t.div: You must accept this to proceed.

div.label: I consent to the processing and storage of my identity documents and financial information for compliance and due diligence purposes.

t.div: You must accept this to proceed.

div.label: I acknowledge that OSUS Real Estate Brokerage LLC is required to conduct Anti-Money Laundering (AML) / Know Your Customer (KYC) checks under UAE Federal Law No. 20 of 2018 and I agree to cooperate fully.

t.div: You must accept this to proceed.

div.p: Please sign below to confirm that all information provided is correct and you consent to this KYC application. Use your mouse or finger (on touch devices).
By submitting, you confirm this signature represents your legal consent to this application.

div.div:
🔒 Your information is encrypted and handled in strict accordance with UAE AML/CFT regulations.
OSUS Real Estate Brokerage LLC | RERA Licensed | +971 4 336 4500 | compliance@osusproperties.com

div.p:
Thank you, .
Your KYC application has been received by our compliance team.

ul.li: 📩 A confirmation will be sent to
🔍 Our team will review your documents within 2–3 business days
📞 You may be contacted for additional information if required
🔐 Save your reference number for status enquiries

div.p:
To check your status later, visit:
/kyc/status/

t.p:
Your application is being reviewed by our compliance team.
Expected turnaround: 2–3 business days.
For urgent queries: compliance@osusproperties.com
